category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Magic Wormhole as a tool to get arbitrary-sized files, directories, or text from one computer to another.
source_facts.description: Securely transfers data between computers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is magic-wormhole; official README and docs use Magic Wormhole.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says complete documentation is at magic-wormhole.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository magic-wormhole/magic-wormhole is linked from the project homepage and README.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it securely transfers data; source_facts.executables lists magic-wormhole and wormhole; official README describes the PAKE-protected wormhole code workflow.
